expectations.text: Explains MetricKit runs out-of-process (not inside the app)
Identifies OOM and watchdog kills as things MetricKit catches that in-process reporters miss
Mentions the opt-in limitation ('Share with App Developers' in Settings)
expectations.evidence: Matched: [], Missing group containing: ['share with app developer']

expectations.text: Recommends using both MetricKit and a third-party crash SDK
